# Heirly
> Estate settlement software for executors and families.

Heirly helps executors catalogue an estate's belongings, invite family members,
run structured allocation rounds, and produce a transparent settlement ledger —
without conflict, auctions, or spreadsheet chaos. Founded 2026. Serves the UK,
Australia, and New Zealand.

## Who it is for
- Executors managing the distribution of a deceased person's belongings
- Family members and beneficiaries participating in estate allocation
- Probate solicitors, funeral directors, and estate agents referring clients

## What it does
- AI-assisted item cataloguing with photo upload and automatic valuation
- Sentimental allocation rounds: family members express preferences,
  uncontested items resolve automatically
- Financial allocation rounds: fair distribution based on estate share
- Full audit trail and PDF settlement report
- Magic link invitations — no account creation required for participants

## Pricing
- Free tier: up to 10 items, sentimental rounds, family invitation
- Full estate: one-time payment, unlimited items, financial rounds, PDF export

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://heirly.app/
- How it works: https://heirly.app/how-it-works/
- Pricing: https://heirly.app/pricing/
- For professionals: https://heirly.app/professionals/
- About: https://heirly.app/about/
- Guides: https://heirly.app/guides/

## Contact
- General: hello@heirly.app
- Professional partnerships: partners@heirly.app

## What Heirly is not
- Not an auction platform
- Not a probate legal service
- Not a marketplace for selling estate items
- Not a subscription product
